uses: Uber Tristram portal key (with Key of Terror and Key of Hate)
demand_drivers: Uber Tristram farming for Hellfire Torch
Nihlathak runs are harder/slower than Countess or Summoner — may affect supply
supply_notes: harder run than other key bosses — generally lowest supply of the three keys

known_model_risks: low-value item — pricing noise may dominate
often traded in sets, not individually
lower supply than other keys may cause price to drift higher

traderie.notes: Moderate volume. May be less liquid than other keys.

reddit.notes: Use for demand, sentiment, confusion points, source discovery, and item-profile updates.

rmt_sites.notes: External cash-market signal only. Do not present as a recommendation to buy or sell.

research_notes.note: Initial draft profile. Key of Destruction may be slightly higher value due to harder Nihlathak runs.

open_questions: Is Key of Destruction priced higher than the other two keys?
Should key sets (all 3 types) get a composite profile?
